projects.title: Weather App V.2
projects.description:
Recently i created a weather app with dark mode background. Today i recreated it with a light mode background. This app is created to check the forecast for your current location or search for a specific city. View hourly and weekly predictions, including temperature, precipitation, and more. Stay ahead of the weather and plan your day with confidence with our easy-to-use app.

Do let me know what you think !

projects.title: Odyssey - Finance Dashboard  ð³
projects.description:
Odyssey is a new fintech dashboard with its user-friendly interface. Users can easily navigate through their spending and transactions data from multiple websites, gaining valuable insights into their financial habits. The dashboard provides clear and concise visualizations of data, making it easy to identify trends and patterns in spending behavior. Odyssey offers a seamless and intuitive experience for users looking to manage their finances in one centralized location.

Let me know what you think about it !!

projects.description:

projects.title: Origin - Card Management Dashboard
projects.description:
Origin is a convenient tool for users to keep track of their multiple cards and manage their spending. With this app, users can store all of their cards in one place and set limits for each individual card.

The dashboard also displays a record of all transactions made with the cards, making it easy for users to stay on top of their spending.

Whether you have one card or multiple cards, the card management dashboard gives you the control you need to manage your finances effectively.

I can't wait to hear your thoughts on the design!

Octane is a social media analytics app that delivers user stats for individual social media accounts.Users may sign in using their own social accounts, and Octane will let you monitor their social media accounts in real time and with precision, including interaction, subscriber or follower count, and audience analytics.It may be used by any individual, social media developer, or corporation to increase their exposure.

Let me know what you guys think!

Hey everyone !

Sub. is a subscription manager that lets you manage all of your services in one place. It assists you in keeping track of active subscriptions as well as other services such as tracking your expenditures, reminding you of renewal dates, and managing them.

Let me know what you guys think!

projects.title: Mutual - Find your mentor
projects.description:
Hey everyone !

Mutual is a mentoring app that brings together a variety of mentees and mentors under one roof. The app allows mentees to connect with experts in various industries and mentors to share their expertise in a variety of ways. The program also offers a community for users to help them discover what they're looking for and a platform for mentors to create lectures or clips and share them with a broader audience.

Let me know what you guys think!
